overall.description: A first-person perspective clip from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a transition from an exterior night cityscape with towering neon-lit skyscrapers to the interior of a futuristic metro train. The camera pans across the cyberpunk cityscape before entering a crowded train car, riding through the city while observing passengers and holographic advertisements, and finally arriving at a station platform.

events.description: camera moves from exterior cityscape into the interior of a metro train

agents.ego_description: standing on a platform looking up at towering skyscrapers with bright neon signage

entered.detail: tall skyscraper with illuminated NC logo and Japanese text signage
bright pink neon sign with TENDU text
contemporary high-rise with grid-patterned lit windows
large digital advertisement displaying a monochrome portrait

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a view looking up at Night City's towering skyscrapers against a dark night sky. The NC corporate tower dominates the left side with bright pink neon signage, while modern glass buildings fill the right. The camera slowly pans across the urban canyon, taking in the cyberpunk cityscape before transitioning indoors.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic metro train interior with holographic displays

events.description: enters the metro train from the exterior platform
train arrives at station platform with BUILDING 1C signage visible

agents.ego_description: standing inside a moving metro train, observing fellow passengers and the cityscape passing by through holographic windows

notable_agents.action: seated man in green sweater and red cap reading a document
man in plaid shirt standing near the train door holding a bag

entered.detail: futuristic train car with yellow grab poles, teal doors, and overhead lighting
transparent windows showing floating holographic advertisements and route information
brown cushioned bench seats along the left side
concrete platform with blue neon BUILDING 1C signage visible as the train arrives

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to the interior of a futuristic metro train filled with passengers. The camera moves through the car, showing seated commuters and standing passengers while holographic advertisements float outside the windows. The train travels through the city, with the interior illuminated by artificial lighting and neon glow from outside. The clip concludes as the train arrives at a station platform marked with blue neon signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the towering exterior heights of a neon-lit metropolis into the enclosed, bustling interior of a futuristic metro train. It begins by looking up at the urban canyon of Night City, where the corporate tower's bright pink signage dominates the dark night sky alongside modern glass skyscrapers. As the camera pans across the cityscape, the perspective shifts seamlessly indoors to the interior of a moving train car filled with seated and standing commuters. The scene then glides through the carriage, illuminated by a mix of artificial light and the glow of holographic advertisements floating past the windows. Finally, the movement concludes as the train slows to a halt, arriving at a station platform marked by vivid blue neon signage.
